# AxiomID — The Human Authorization Protocol

> Prove human intent behind AI actions with decentralized identity verification.

## What is AxiomID?

AxiomID is a decentralized identity platform that combines Pi Network authentication, sovereign passports, and verifiable credentials to create a trust layer for human-AI collaboration.

## Core Concepts

- **DID (Decentralized Identifier):** Each user gets a W3C-compliant `did:axiom:pi:{uid}` identifier
- **Sovereign Passport:** A public identity card with trust scores, verification badges, and attestation history
- **Trust Score:** Algorithmic reputation computed from XP (70%) + verified stamps (30%)
- **Stamps:** Cryptographically signed verifiable credentials (KYA, Social, Pi Wallet, Agent Delegation)
- **Agent Governance:** AI agents execute skills in isolated sandboxes with ethical oversight

## Trust Tiers

| Tier | XP Required | Access Level |
|------|-------------|--------------|
| Visitor | 0 | Read-only |
| Citizen | 100 | Social stamps, basic agent access |
| Validator | 500 | Agent delegation, marketplace install |
| Sovereign | 1000 | Full trust, vault staking, vouching power |

## API Endpoints

- `GET /api/passport/{username}` — Public passport data
- `GET /api/passport/demo` — Demo passport
- `GET /api/leaderboard` — Top users ranked by XP
- `GET /api/did-document` — W3C DID document

## Tech Stack

- Frontend: Next.js 16, React 19, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS
- Backend: Vercel Serverless, Cloudflare Workers
- Database: PostgreSQL (Prisma), D1, Vectorize
- Auth: Pi Network SDK, Ed25519 sovereign keys

## Links

- Website: https://axiomid.app
- GitHub: https://github.com/Moeabdelaziz007/AxiomID
- Claim identity: https://axiomid.app/claim
- Passports: https://axiomid.app/passport/{username}
